title: westringia cephalantha
intro: Westringia cephalantha, also known as Coast Westringia, is a flowering plant native to Australia, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating colds, fever, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Westringia cephalantha include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs and congestion, and aiding in the management of respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Westringia cephalantha include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
